name: Balancer V3
special_mechanism_summary: Balancer V3 redesigns the Vault to separate pool accounting from logic: pools wrap ERC-4626 assets at Vault level, and the Vault uses flash accounting (balances checked only at end of a batch operation). Hooks allow custom logic at swap/add-liquidity/remove-liquidity lifecycle points.
notes: C3' combination potential: ERC-4626 integration at Vault level means divergence between external vault reported price and market price creates sandwichable windows; flash accounting spans any pool operation so tokens can be borrowed from pool reserves without collateral within the callback, analogous to an uncollateralized flash loan.
